headline: Reddit Trading Group WallStreetBets Goes Private: Where Will Retail Traders Go Now?
summary:
Reddit group r/WallStreetBets (WSB) has closed its doors and is now a private-only community. 

What Happened: Only users who moderators have approved will be able to view the page and take part in discussions.

headline: July SPAC Merger Vote Calendar: A Look At Upcoming Votes And Stocks To Watch
summary: After a busy June that saw dozens of SPAC merger votes completed, July is shaping up to be another busy month for the SPAC sector.

headline: Tesla Q2 Deliveries Evidence of 'True Growth Story,' EV Maker On Track to Exceed 2021 Deliveries Forecast: Gene Munster
Elon Musk Tweeted Late Friday: Cybertruck will be almost exactly what was shown. We're adding rear wheel steering, so it can do tight turns & maneuver with high agility
